MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BUHLER, TAMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUHLER, TAMMY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF BY MONEY ORDER, MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $150 BY MONEY ORDER FOR SIXTEEN (16) MONTHS AND A FINAL INSTALLMENT OF $100 ON THE 17TH MONTH. FIRST MONTHLY PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE BY SEPTEMBER 20, 2014. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON SEP-20-2014 AND ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
